title: [InstCombine] Add transforms `(icmp spred (and X, Y), X)` if `X` or `Y` are known signed/unsigned
test_patch:

@@ -98,8 +98,7 @@ declare i8 @gen8()
 define i1 @c0() {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: @c0(
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[X:%.*]] = call i8 @gen8()
